Program

Our Operating Room Laboratory; It has all the inventories in an operating room room that our students will encounter in the field after graduation and enables our 1st year students to prepare for the hospital environment before hospital applications. Our students gain many applications of their professions such as preparing the operating room, preparing the patient for surgery, assisting the surgeon during surgery, transporting the patient, collecting the operating table, etc. in our laboratory in the company of department teachers.

Operating Room Technician

They are auxiliary surgical health personnel who prepare all surgical materials used in the operating room and ensure that they are used during surgery, who are directly involved in all surgical teams, who can assist the surgeon during surgery, and who have practical and theoretical equipment in other fields of health sciences in a multidisciplinary manner.

Features that Operating Room Laboratory Technicians should have

Under the responsibility of the specialist in charge of the operating room and the specialist performing the surgery in the absence of a specialist;

- To be able to prepare the operating table and instruments before surgery,

- To be able to assist the surgical team during surgery,

- To be able to provide sterilization (germ removal) of the instruments used after surgery and to ensure their preservation,

- To be able to ensure the maintenance, cleaning, storage and supply of all devices and instruments in the operating room

- To be able to ensure the protection of operating room sterilization.

Operating Room Technician Employment Opportunities

It has become a profession that is needed more with the low number of graduates and the proliferation of private hospitals. Since hospitals need specially trained health personnel in this field, job opportunities are high.

Operating Room Technician Working Areas

Operating room technicians operating room units of private and public hospitals.

Operating Room Technician Occupational Progression

Those who graduate from the Operating Room Services Associate Degree program can make a vertical transfer to Emergency Aid and Disaster Management, Nursing and Nursing and Health Services undergraduate programs if they are successful in DGS by ÖSYM.
